ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "sub_title" TEXT /* Subtitle of the episode */,
  "season_position" INTEGER /* Position of the episode within the season */,
  "episode_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the episode */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "writers" TEXT /* Writers of the episode */,
  "production_code" TEXT /* Production code for the episode */,
  "episode_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the episode */,
  "episode_synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_position FOREIGN KEY ("season_position") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the season belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number within the series */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date when the season started airing */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the season ended airing */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the series */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network on which the series airs */,
  "first_air_date" TEXT /* Date when the series first aired */,
  "last_air_date" TEXT /* Date when the series last aired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the series (e.g., ongoing, ended, canceled) */,
  "number_of_seasons" INTEGER /* Total number of seasons in the series */,
  "series_synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_watching" (
  "watching_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watching event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being watched */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user watching the episode */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was watched */,
  "watch_type" TEXT /* Type of watching (e.g., full watch, partial watch) */,
  "watch_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the watch session in minutes */,
  "watch_device" TEXT /* Device used for watching (e.g., mobile, desktop, TV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watching_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_watching_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_watching_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., subscriber, curator, admin) */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the user signed up */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's content preferences (e.g., favorite genres, preferred actors) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* User's current subscription plan (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended episode */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., similar to previously watched episodes, based on user's favorite genre) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the episode */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode added to the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the episode was added to the watchlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the watchlist item (e.g., planned, watched) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the episode */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "episode_synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the episode in the review */,
  "reviewer_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the reviewer (for security and tracking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_reviews_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., title change, content edit) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field that was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_updates_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
